reviews.review_description:
Enjoyed the game! If you do like escape room/ horror games this is done for you! Puzzles on it are not that easy to solve! At certain points i was stuck and got to think deeply to find my way haha 😅
Ohh and that horror game feeling during the whole game 😰 (was really scared 😱 at certain moment)

I played before and after the update and I see such an improvement in the frame rates. The clues become more complicated to find as you go from room to room.  I was jump scared so many times, had me screaming the whole game. I was on edge the entire time. I definitely look forward to going back in to the game every time! In order to attempt my escape once again. I would love for my friends to try this escape room game to hear their experience. I plan on getting some footage for my Instagram soon. Just need to pass the room im currently stuck in(with dead bodies&medication to take). I am the go to for horror games and this one has me stumped and scared for sure. Great job creator. Can't wait for your next game.

The game was very detailed, and the story was deep and engaging—I really loved it. However, at times the movement didn’t feel very comfortable, which slightly affected the experience. I understand this is a common issue in VR, but improving it would make the game even better.

Right now the game is short, but there's quite a lot of detail here which all help to give off that dark and unnerving vibe! The puzzles are hard and you really need to slow down and spend time going over all the details to solve them, yet if you've played other escape room games then I'm sure you've expected this and so far I really enjoyed this one!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for trying out the game!
I’m glad you enjoyed the atmosphere and the puzzles. Future updates will include more content. Hope you give it another try!

reviews.review_description:
Disclaimer: I did receive a 90% off discount on this game to review it.

This game has a few hidden code escape rooms with decent horror elements that did catch me off guard once or twice.

I do believe that with some future updates from the dev to refine and polish the experience, the game could be improved upon, so I have rated it 3 stars for now from this perspective.

This is a good choice to buy for people who want a mildly scary VR experience without any way to "lose", but does contain some violent imagery so it is not for younger audiences.
Just a little short for now, but gave me a cool coupple chills down my spine. Hopefully the devs will make the game longer with more episodes and then it will probably be worth more than it is now.

developer_response.body: Our top priority is that you enjoy the game. If you find it a bit short, don’t worry — between now and next week we’ll be expanding it and releasing an update.

reviews.review_description: A short, fun experience with puzzles accessible to all ages. The atmosphere is well done.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! We're really happy to hear you enjoyed the atmosphere and the puzzles.

reviews.review_title: I hope there will be more hints..
reviews.review_description: Using jumping motions can prevent VR motion sickness (I experienced some VR motion sickness during testing, but other escape room games with jumping and movement don't have this problem), and the game is very exciting... but I got stuck in the second room... haha... I hope there will be more hints... to make the game more fun for players.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed feedback! 🙏
We’re really happy to hear that you found the game exciting.
We appreciate your note about VR motion sickness and movement mechanics — this is something we’re actively looking into improving.
Regarding the second room, you’re not alone 😄 We’re planning to add clearer hints and optional guidance to make the experience smoother while keeping the challenge fun.
Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts

reviews.review_title: It was like real scape room!
reviews.review_description: It felt very close to the escape rooms I’ve experienced in real life, and I could really feel the same excitement again. It was a bit short, but I hope more levels will be added in the future. Thanks to the developers for creating such a unique and enjoyable experience.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! 🙏
We’re really happy to hear that the game felt like a real escape room and brought back that same excitement you’ve experienced in real life — that was exactly our goal.
We appreciate your feedback about the length, and we’re definitely planning to add more levels and content in future updates.
Thanks again for playing and supporting our work! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Although the game is short, the jump scares are very well done and genuinely scary.
I encountered a few small bugs, but they didn’t ruin the experience.
Overall, it’s a solid horror VR game. I would rate it 4.5 stars if possible.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind and detailed feedback!
I’m really glad to hear that the jump scares worked well for you and that you found them genuinely scary — that means a lot to me as a developer.
I appreciate you pointing out the small bugs as well; I’m actively working on fixing them in future updates.
Thanks again for playing and for the high rating — your support truly motivates me to keep improving the game!

reviews.review_description: The story was quite short, and in some parts I could pass through objects, which I didn’t really like. However, the art and overall story were good for a VR game.
